data.title: BNB Drops Below 590 USDT with a Narrowed 1.13% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 18, 2025, 00:05 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 590 USDT and is now trading at 589.599976 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.13% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: DCG founder: When BTC was discovered, the price was only $7-8, and investing in BTC is more profitable than investing in crypto startups
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Barry Silbert, founder and CEO of Grayscale's parent company Digital Currency Group (DCG), said on the podcast "Journey Man" that his highest-yielding investment is holding Bitcoin, not investing in crypto startups. When he discovered Bitcoin in 2011, the price of each Bitcoin was about $7-8. As the price of Bitcoin began to climb, he shifted his investment focus to investing in emerging cryptocurrency companies like Coinbase and used Bitcoin to fund these transactions. But in hindsight, just holding Bitcoin is better than anything else. (FinanceFeeds)

data.title: Crypto exchange eXch to shut down on May 1 amid money laundering allegations
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto trading platform eXch announced that it will cease operations on May 1. It was previously reported that the platform was used to launder some of the stolen funds from the Bybit trading platform.
According to the official announcement released on April 17, eXch said that the majority of its management team voted to "cease operations and withdraw" in response to allegations that the North Korean hacker group Lazarus Group laundered about $35 million through the platform-the funds originated from the $1.4 billion hacker attack on Bybit. The trading platform said it has become the target of a "transatlantic joint law enforcement action" aimed at shutting down its business and possibly filing criminal charges.
The trading platform initially denied the allegations of the chain detective ZachXBT that it helped the Lazarus Group launder money, but admitted to handling a "very small part of the funds" from the February hacking incident. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Wyoming Considers Policy Adjustments for Stablecoin Regulation
data.description:
According to PANews, the Wyoming Stablecoin Commission is contemplating changes to its policy language to align with potential regulatory guidelines from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). During a meeting held on April 17 at the Wyoming State Capitol extension, committee member Joel Revill suggested that the commission could mitigate the risk of the proposed WYST stablecoin being classified as a security under SEC rules. Previously, the SEC issued guidance indicating that certain 'regulated stablecoins' are considered 'non-securities' and are largely exempt from reporting requirements. Following this, discussions ensued among committee members and Executive Director Anthony Apollo.

Apollo stated, "We intend to create our own terminology around some of these issues for clarification, which will serve as a starting point for committee discussions." He added that while internal discussions regarding the SEC's guidelines have taken place, the matter will be addressed in a memorandum scheduled for May.

The Wyoming Stablecoin Commission was established following the state's enactment of a law to issue a state-level stablecoin pegged to the U.S. dollar and redeemable for fiat currency. The commission has been exploring issues related to the WYST stablecoin. Wyoming Governor Mark Gordon initially announced plans to launch the stablecoin in the first quarter of 2025, but the timeline was later adjusted to a potential release in July.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Google Search Interest Peaks in March 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin's search interest on Google reached a score of 34 in March 2025, marking the highest level of the year. This represents a 26% increase compared to January and February, which had scores of 31 and 27, respectively. This surge indicates a reversal in the declining trend observed since November 2024.

Similarly, Ethereum's search interest also peaked in March, reaching a score of 19, slightly up from 16 in February. Analysts suggest that the increased interest in Bitcoin and Ethereum may reflect renewed curiosity among retail investors, outperforming the trends seen earlier in 2025.

A broader theory for the rise in Bitcoin interest could be linked to the newly announced U.S. tariffs, which may have reignited narratives around Bitcoin as "digital gold" and a "store of value," particularly amid heightened geopolitical or macroeconomic tensions. Supporting this theory, the BTC to SPX ratio has risen over 8% since the announcement of tariffs on April 2, known as "Liberation Day."

data.title: Ripple's Acquisition of Hidden Road Advances with Key Regulatory Approval
data.description:
According to PANews, Hidden Road, a major brokerage firm set to be acquired by Ripple, announced on Thursday that it has received approval from the U.S. Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) to operate as a broker-dealer in the United States. This approval, granted to its subsidiary Hidden Road Partners CIV US LLC, will enable the company to expand its fixed income prime brokerage platform. As a broker-dealer, Hidden Road plans to offer a broader range of compliance services to institutional clients, including clearing, financing, and prime brokerage for fixed income assets.

Earlier this month, Hidden Road revealed an agreement with blockchain infrastructure service company Ripple, under which Ripple will acquire Hidden Road for $1.25 billion. This acquisition is subject to regulatory approval and is expected to be completed in the coming months.

data.title: Google’s AI safety promises under scrutiny after Gemini report
data.description:
Google shared a safety paper on its flagship artificial‑intelligence model, Gemini 2. 5 Pro. Experts say it leaves key risks unexplained. The company posted the technical paper on Thursday, several weeks after it released Gemini 2. 5 Pro to customers. The document lists the internal tests Google ran on the model but offers few facts on how […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/googles-ai-safety-promises-under-scrutiny-after-gemini-report/

data.title: Gold Is Still the Safe-Haven King, While Bitcoin Loses Out: JP Morgan
data.description:
JP Morgan analysts said in a report Thursday that investors are choosing gold over Bitcoin in a bid to find a safe haven amid volatility.
source: https://decrypt.co/315307/gold-safe-haven-not-bitcoin-jpmorgan

data.title: Binance Advising Nations On Building Bitcoin Reserves – Report
data.description:
Binance, the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, is advising multiple governments on developing regulatory frameworks for digital assets and establishing national strategic bitcoin reserves, according to CEO Richard Teng.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/17/binance-advising-nations-on-building-bitcoin-reserves-report/
